infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RunAm needs your location to show nearby riders and estimate delivery times.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RunAm needs camera access to scan packages and capture delivery proof.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow RunAm to use your location to track deliveries.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RunAm to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow RunAm to access your photos for package images.
